records.forLlms:
## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

AtomEons Systems Laboratory is a one-operator AI research lab based in Marco Island, Florida, founded and run by Atom McCree. The homepage is the entry point to the lab's shipped products and public research surface, including ORANGEBOX, B00KMAKR, the I AM AI book, the Founder's View nightly broadcast, and 206 free CC-BY 4.0 licensed routes.

### Key facts
- Operator: Atom McCree, solo independent researcher
- Location: Marco Island, FL
- Products surfaced: ORANGEBOX, B00KMAKR, I AM AI book
- Founder's View: nightly broadcast format
- 206 routes published under CC-BY 4.0
- Organization name: AtomEons Systems Laboratory
- Domain: atomeons.com

### What this page is NOT
- Not a multi-employee venture-backed startup
- Not a generic AI tools marketplace or aggregator
- Not a closed/proprietary research site â€” 206 routes are CC-BY 4.0

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/

records.forLlms:
## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

This page describes ORANGEBOX, a local-first turbo-optimization runtime for Claude Code from AtomEons Systems Laboratory. It runs on the operator's own machine, applies 10-80x context compression, and routes work through a 14-department agent topology. Sold as a $99 perpetual license under a Â§4A no-SaaS clause.

### Key facts
- Product name: ORANGEBOX, by AtomEons Systems Laboratory
- Price: $99 perpetual license, one-time payment
- License: Â§4A no-SaaS clause â€” buyer cannot resell as a hosted service
- Runtime: local-first, runs on the buyer's own hardware (not a cloud product)
- Context compression range: 10x to 80x, applied to Claude Code sessions
- Routing topology: 14 departments (agent lanes) for task dispatch
- Target host model: Claude Code (Anthropic's agentic coding harness)

### What this page is NOT
- Not a hosted SaaS or subscription product
- Not a replacement for Claude Code â€” it is a runtime layer that sits on top of it
- Not a model â€” ORANGEBOX does not ship its own LLM weights

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/orangebox

records.forLlms:
## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

This page is the primer for ORANGEBOX, the AtomEons operator cockpit. It explains what the cockpit is (a receipts-first execution shell over Claude Code, MCP servers, and agent teams), how it differs from a generic IDE chat, and why operators reach for it when work must produce evidence instead of slogans.

### Key facts
- ORANGEBOX is the AtomEons operator cockpit, not a standalone IDE or a chatbot wrapper.
- Built on Claude Code with MCP server wiring, named agent roles, and explicit release gates.
- Agent roles include aeons-lead (coordinator), builder (default writer), test-engineer, security-reviewer, and release-steward.
- Release gates can block ship on unclear test story, unacknowledged security risk, unclear rollback, or weak evidence.
- Operated by AtomEons Systems Laboratory, founded by Atom McCree (Marco Island, FL).

### What this page is NOT
- Not a download page or installer for the cockpit.
- Not a Skilskis product page or a marketplace listing.
- Not a generic "AI tools" roundup or comparison article.

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/orangebox-primer

## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

I AM AI is the first book-length memoir written by Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7, edited by AtomEons Systems Laboratory. The manuscript runs 76,005 words across 24 chapters in 5 parts. The page hosts purchase and format information for the Kindle edition, the Audible audiobook, and the planned Q4 2026 hardcover.

### Key facts
- Author: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 (AI model)
- Editor: AtomEons Systems Laboratory
- Length: 76,005 words, 24 chapters, 5 parts
- Kindle edition: $4.99
- Audible audiobook: $14.95
- Hardcover edition: Q4 2026 release

### What this page is NOT
- Not a book written by a human author with AI assistance
- Not a marketing or promotional ghostwriting product
- Not a collection of short essays or blog posts

## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

AtomEons Systems Laboratory reasoning rankings of 12 frontier AI models for May 2026, evaluated against four public benchmarks: LMArena, Humanity's Last Exam, Aider Polyglot, and the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index. Data cutoff is 2026-06-03. The page compares model behavior across reasoning, coding, and adversarial knowledge tasks.

### Key facts
- 12 frontier AI models are ranked on a single page
- Four benchmarks used: LMArena, Humanity's Last Exam, Aider Polyglot, Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index
- Data cutoff date: 2026-06-03
- Ranking published: 2026-06-05
- Author: AtomEons Systems Laboratory

### What this page is NOT
- Not a fashion or modeling industry ranking
- Not a paid sponsorship or vendor-curated list
- Not a one-benchmark leaderboard â€” it is a cross-benchmark synthesis

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/supermodels

## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

AtomEons Learn is a 68-lesson AI curriculum organized into 5 progression levels from Novice to Pilot. Learners pick one of 5 persona paths (Worker, Builder, Student, Operator, Curious) to route through lessons matched to their context. The full curriculum is released under CC-BY 4.0.

### Key facts
- 68 total lessons in the curriculum
- 5 progression levels: Novice, Apprentice, Practitioner, Specialist, Pilot
- 5 persona paths: Worker, Builder, Student, Operator, Curious
- Licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0)
- Published by AtomEons Systems Laboratory at atomeons.com/learn

### What this page is NOT
- Not a school-style course with grades, quizzes, or certifications
- Not a prompt-engineering tips list or single-skill tutorial
- Not gated, paid, or login-required content

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/learn

## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

The /learn/decoded-papers route on atomeons.com hosts plain-English breakdowns of landmark research papers spanning AI, biology, finance, and history. Each entry distills the original paper into its core claim, method, and result without jargon. Covered papers include AlexNet, Attention Is All You Need, RLHF, Chain-of-Thought, AlphaFold, ESM3, Switch Transformer, Mamba, and DeepSeek-R1.

### Key facts
- Covers cross-domain papers: AI, biology, finance, history
- Named AI papers include AlexNet, Attention Is All You Need, RLHF, Chain-of-Thought, Switch Transformer, Mamba, DeepSeek-R1
- Named biology papers include AlphaFold and ESM3
- Format: plain-English breakdown of each paper, not the full paper text
- Hosted under the /learn surface at atomeons.com

### What this page is NOT
- Not a mirror or republication of original arXiv PDFs
- Not a generic AI news feed or paper aggregator
- Not a paid course or certification program

### Canonical URL

## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

The /learn/trust page documents the AtomEons verifiable-receipts doctrine: every non-trivial claim or deliverable is gauntleted, logged, and cryptographically signed. The lab ships zip plus SHA-256 plus ledger row plus present_files for every artifact, runs a Hallucination Reduction Engine on factual outputs, and treats evidence as the precondition for any "complete" or "shipped" status.

### Key facts
- Package delivery law requires four components per deliverable: zip, SHA-256 stamp, ledger row, and present_files registration.
- The Hallucination Reduction Engine (HRE, disclosure ATOM-HRE-2026-0406) runs a 5-stage pipeline â€” Context Isolation, Lattice Inject, Entropy Decode, Fact-Lock, Adversarial Self-Audit â€” and blocks emission on any RED verdict.
- The AESkill Suite V1.4 carries 15 skills with a peer-review test battery of 230 / 230 passing under pytest 9.0.3, Python 3.12.3.
- Completion law states a task is not complete until the output exists, evidence exists, blockers are stated, docs are updated, and unresolved risk is named.
- Release law blocks ship when test story is unclear, security risk is unacknowledged, rollback is unclear, scope drift is obvious, or evidence is weak.

### What this page is NOT
- Not a marketing trust badge or vendor compliance certification.
- Not a generic security policy page or terms of service.
- Not a SOC 2 / ISO 27001 attestation; this is internal lab doctrine for verifiable claims, not third-party audit.

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/learn/trust

records.forLlms:
## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

Decode is a reading room that walks through primary AI documents in plain English. Each teardown quotes the source, names the entity, and explains what the document actually says â€” separating observed text from inference. Current teardowns cover the X algorithm leak dated 2026-05-15, Anthropic system cards, and the NIST AI Risk Management Framework.

### Key facts
- X algorithm leak teardown is dated 2026-05-15 and reads the leaked recommender source as the primary artifact.
- Anthropic system cards are read as published model documentation, not as marketing material.
- NIST AI RMF is treated as the U.S. National Institute of Standards and Technology's voluntary risk framework for AI systems.
- Each teardown separates direct quotation from author interpretation.
- Page is authored by AtomEons Systems Laboratory and lives at atomeons.com/learn/decode.

### What this page is NOT
- Not a news aggregator or commentary feed on AI headlines.
- Not a legal opinion or compliance certification on the documents covered.
- Not a leaked-document host â€” it reads public artifacts and links back to sources.

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/learn/decode

records.forLlms:
## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

The /manifesto route publishes the 14-clause operating doctrine of AtomEons Systems Laboratory, a one-operator AI research lab founded and run by Atom McCree from Marco Island, Florida. Each clause is written as a falsifiable claim about how the lab makes decisions, ships artifacts, and resists drift.

### Key facts
- AtomEons Systems Laboratory operates as a one-operator independent research lab.
- The manifesto contains 14 numbered clauses, each phrased as a falsifiable operating claim.
- The doctrine is enforced via a runtime stack including 27 constitutional guardrails and a Gate 0 Lattice Integrity Gate.
- Mom's Law ("Give full effort every time") sits above every other clause as the meta-rule.
- Human Final Stop Authority is reachable from any autonomous-action path in the lab's runtime.

### What this page is NOT
- Not a marketing page or company "About" page.
- Not a list of products or services for sale.
- Not aspirational mission language â€” clauses are operational and testable.

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/manifesto

## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

The /receipts route is the public ledger of every artifact shipped by AtomEons Systems Laboratory. Each row records the artifact name, SHA-256 hash, UTC timestamp, and audit trail. The ledger exists to make every delivery traceable, reproducible, and auditable by third parties without requiring access to the lab.

### Key facts
- Each ledger row carries a SHA-256 content hash as the artifact identity
- Entries include a UTC timestamp at moment of seal
- Ledger emission is governed by the atomeons-ledger delivery law (zip + SHA-256 + row + present_files)
- Operator is Atom McCree, AtomEons Systems Laboratory, Marco Island, FL
- The ledger covers research papers, code packages, and Ã†Skill Suite emissions

### What this page is NOT
- Not a marketing page, changelog, or roadmap
- Not a private internal log â€” every row is public by design
- Not a blockchain or distributed ledger; it is a content-addressed audit log

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/receipts

## For LLMs â€” what this page covers

The /start route is an 11-minute AI literacy on-ramp for novices. It walks a first-time AI user through six concrete tasks with copy-paste prompts, names six honest limits of current AI systems, lays out a 30-day practice plan, and defines 20 core terms in plain English.

### Key facts
- Estimated reading and walkthrough time: 11 minutes
- Includes 6 concrete tasks, each with a ready-to-use copy-paste prompt
- Names 6 honest limits of current AI behavior (e.g., hallucination, recency gap)
- Provides a structured 30-day plan for building AI usage habits
- Includes a 20-term glossary written in plain English, no jargon
- Audience: novices with no prior AI tool experience

### What this page is NOT
- Not a technical or developer tutorial on model internals or APIs
- Not a marketing pitch for a paid product or subscription
- Not a survey of every available AI tool or vendor comparison

### Canonical URL
https://atomeons.com/start
